name: github-stars-mcp
description: AI-native GitHub Stars and User Lists management with safe, reviewable change plans.

interface.shortDescription: Let AI safely organize GitHub Stars and User Lists.
interface.longDescription: Search, sync, filter, classify, plan, inspect, apply, audit, and roll back GitHub Stars and User List changes through a local, least-privilege MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Sync my GitHub Stars, then show useful cleanup opportunities.
Find strong GitHub repositories for my topic and compare them.
Plan a safe reorganization of my Stars and User Lists.
